payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Tall, dark brown stained wooden two-door cabinet with vertical recessed panels and a visible center seam; small horizontal black pull near the upper area, matte finish with minor scuffing; mostly visible but edge-cropped on the left and partially cropped on the right by adjacent shelving — appears approximately 1.5 meters from the camera.
attributes: edge-cropped left and partially cropped right

message.content: {"label":"cabinet","short_description":"dark wood paneled cabinet edge-crop","long_description":"Tall, dark brown stained wooden two-door cabinet with vertical recessed panels and a visible center seam; small horizontal black pull near the upper area, matte finish with minor scuffing; mostly visible but edge-cropped on the left and partially cropped on the right by adjacent shelving — appears approximately 1.5 meters from the camera.","attributes":["dark brown stained wood","vertical recessed panels","two-door with center seam","black horizontal pull near top","matte finish with minor scuffs","edge-cropped left and partially cropped right","adjacent shelving visible on right"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.5}
